title: Caf's Cobblemon Ascension
description: A cozy Cobblemon experience made for you and your friends satisfaction
body:
Explore a vast world, new adventures await as you as you travel the region exploring a large variety of custom structures, capturing loads of Cobblemon, and facing new challenges unlike anything seen before! 
_This pack is made to play with friends or by yourself_

# Features
- Battle gimmicks (Mega evolution, Dynmaxxing, Z-moves, Tera-typing)
- Interactive shops around the world
- Pokenavs
- Monuments/Structures for most legendary Cobblemon
- Custom Cobblemon themed towns
- Cobblemon breeding
- NPC trainers from all regions in-game to battle and their respective leagues to challenge
- Technical Machines (TMs) and Technical Records (TRs)
- Immersive World Generation
- Immersive farming and cooking
- QOL mods like storage mods, waystones, veinminer, and built-in shaders
#
# Please Note:
As of version 1.5.0, this modpack will be hosted strictly on fabric, and all older versions are unsupported
#
